(6) Except where [ F100 Practice Direction 34E provides otherwise, the court ] must register the order unless—


(7) If the court F103 ... refuses to register an order to which this rule relates the court officer must notify the applicant.


(8) If the court F104 ... registers an order the court officer must send written notice of that fact to—

metadata.title: Part 34 — Reciprocal Enforcement of Maintenance Orders
